## Summary

<!-- What changed? Be specific. -->

## Scope

- [ ] vault/ (authoring notes)
- [ ] docs/ (published content)
- [ ] scripts/ (sync/lint tooling)
- [ ] _quarto.yml / CI (infrastructure)

## Checks

- [ ] `make sync` passed
- [ ] `make lint` passed
- [ ] `make build` passed (or CI green)
- [ ] Links checked — no broken relative references
- [ ] Slug changes reviewed (if any slugs changed, old URLs break)
- [ ] Frontmatter valid on all changed publishable notes
- [ ] Assets included if referenced
